title: 为什么股票比房产更适合作为退休基金
content: Stocks are generally more suitable than real estate for retirement funds due to superior liquidity, lower transaction costs, easier diversification, and historically higher long-term returns. Unlike property, stocks require no maintenance expenses, can be quickly converted to cash, and allow flexible partial withdrawals. Real estate demands significant capital, carries concentrated location risk, and involves high fees and illiquidity that can jeopardize retirement timing flexibility.

title: 豆包6月下旬正式付费，并加速打通抖音电商丨独家
content: Doubao, ByteDance's AI chatbot with 336 million monthly active users globally, plans to launch paid subscription tiers in late June 2025, priced from free to 500 yuan monthly. The company aims to integrate e-commerce functions by Q3 2025, connecting users to Douyin's shopping platform. ByteDance is ramping up AI commercialization amid slowing user growth and massive infrastructure investments, with its 2025 AI budget reaching 200 billion yuan. The firm is also expanding its enterprise-facing cloud service Volcano Engine, which captured 49.5% of China's public cloud large model API market in 2025.

title: Why are large language models so terrible at video games?
content: Commenters discussed why large language models perform poorly at video games, citing reasons such as lack of real-time visual processing, inability to learn from immediate feedback, and insufficient spatial reasoning. Some noted that LLMs excel at text-based games but struggle with action-oriented titles requiring rapid coordination. Others suggested that current architectures lack the embodied cognition and continuous sensory-motor loops that human players use intuitively.

Nvidia, Microsoft, and Arm jointly launched RTX Spark, a new Windows PC chip for local AI Agent computing, marking a shift from cloud-dependent AI PCs to locally-powered workstations. First devices arrive this fall from Dell, Lenovo, HP, Asus, MSI, and Microsoft.

Meanwhile, smartphone sales face severe decline—IDC projects 13.9% drop by 2026—with rising component costs squeezing manufacturers like Xiaomi, whose Q1 2026 profits fell 43%. For ecosystem companies such as Xiaomi and Huawei, AI PCs represent the critical next screen beyond phones, enabling complex Agent workflows and completing their "device-to-car-to-home" ecosystems.

title: 疯狂烧了数十亿美元 Token 之后，硅谷大厂开始限制员工 Token 用量了
content: Silicon Valley tech giants are cutting back on employee AI token usage after billions in wasted spending. Companies like Uber burned through annual AI budgets in months, while Salesforce pays Anthropic $300 million yearly. "Tokenmaxxing"—pushing maximum AI usage—led to employees using enterprise AI for trivial tasks, with hidden costs reaching 80% of procurement expenses. Firms now face a core problem: individual productivity gains don't translate to business revenue growth. With ROI metrics largely missing, companies are shifting from measuring usage to demanding measurable outcomes, while AI vendors begin offering result-based pricing rather than token-based billing.

title: 智谱、MiniMax为什么着急回A股？
content: China's leading AI firms Zhipu and MiniMax are pursuing A+H share listings, using Hong Kong IPOs to establish global valuation benchmarks before returning to A-shares. This reversed path from earlier Chinese tech companies reflects a strategic shift: HK provides liquidity and international pricing, while Shanghai's STAR Market offers national strategic positioning, patient capital from state funds, and critical industrial policy support. The move signals a broader migration of Chinese tech assets toward domestic capital markets, driven by AI's dependence on local data, computing resources, and government partnerships.

title: 泡泡玛特王宁的“喷泉”理论
content: Wang Ning, founder of Pop Mart, explains consumer psychology through a "fountain" theory: people feel rational guilt about wasting tap water with practical utility, but wastefully accept decorative fountains without concern. This illustrates how emotionally-driven, low-utility purchases—like Pop Mart's collectible toys—bypass rational cost-benefit analysis. The observation connects to a potential societal shift from Japan's third to fourth consumer era, where emotional satisfaction increasingly drives spending. Investor Duan Yongping's recent support for Pop Mart surprised many, reflecting this evolving consumption pattern.

title: 福建老板打拼十年，成为互联网巨头眼中“香饽饽”
content: Chinese grocery delivery firm Pupu Supermarket, founded in Fuzhou in 2016, has drawn acquisition interest from Alibaba, Meituan, and JD.com, with rumored valuations of $2–5 billion. The regional instant-retail pioneer operates 400+ large front warehouses across 9 southern cities, achieving $30 billion RMB annual revenue and profitability in 2024. Despite denials from Meituan and JD, analysts say Pupu faces shrinking growth: user expansion lags competitors, gross margin growth is flattening, and giants are encroaching on its core South China markets. As the last independent major player in China's struggling fresh-food warehouse model, Pupu's regional dominance offers limited long-term value without national scaling, making sale to a major internet platform likely its optimal path before its negotiating position weakens further.

title: 如何提高徒手击杀蚊子的能力
content: Improving hand-killing mosquito skills requires understanding their escape patterns. Mosquitoes take off backward and upward when sensing air pressure changes from approaching hands. Effective techniques include clapping from above and behind to block their exit, using cupped hands to create air traps, practicing predictive striking rather than chasing, and attacking when mosquitoes are stationary or feeding. Faster hand speed and ambient lighting reduction also increase success rates.

title: 日本车企巨头开始将筹码押向印度，都有哪些考量？能借此「新基地」翻盘吗？

title: “一人公司”爆火：有人年赚百万，有人收入缩水90%
content: "One-person companies" (OPCs) using AI tools have surged in China, reaching 16 million by mid-2025. Case studies show mixed results: a game developer earned 800,000-1 million yuan yearly with AI-assisted development; a Japan-based materials entrepreneur earns triple average salaries; a biotech founder doubled income. However, 52.7% reportedly earn under 7,000 yuan monthly, and one ex-internet worker saw income drop 90%. AI reduces costs and timelines but doesn't guarantee success—industry experience and client resources remain critical barriers.

title: 一周3.3k star，微软开启Skills自我进化，像训练神经网络一样训练技能
content: Microsoft open-sourced SkillOpt, a framework that treats agent skill documents as trainable parameters in text space. Instead of adjusting model weights, it optimizes natural language instructions guiding agent behavior through a training loop mimicking neural network optimization: rollout (forward pass), reflection on failures/successes (backward pass), structured text edits (parameter update), and validation gating. Techniques include textual learning rates to prevent catastrophic forgetting, rejected-edit buffers for negative feedback, and meta-skills for optimizer evolution. Tested across 52 configurations (7 models, 6 benchmarks, 3 environments), SkillOpt achieved optimal or tied-for-optimal results in all cases, with especially large gains for smaller models.

title: A股投资者教育

title: 微软 GitHub Copilot 改计费模式后成本暴涨，引开发者吐槽
content: Microsoft's GitHub Copilot switched from fixed monthly subscriptions to token-based billing on June 1, causing costs to surge dramatically for many users. Some developers report monthly fees jumping from tens to thousands of dollars, sparking widespread complaints on social media. Critics blame Microsoft for previously encouraging unrestrained usage before abruptly changing rules, while others attribute high costs to inefficient coding practices. Small companies and individual developers face particular financial pressure from the new pricing model.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技

title: 天涯社区6 月 1 日正式恢复访问
content: Chinese online forum Tianya Community will resume operations on June 1, 2026, after being shut down for nearly three years since 2023 due to financial difficulties. The platform's official Weibo account confirmed that users' posts, friends, and saved content remain intact. Previous重启 attempts included a failed 1999 yuan service package launch in 2024 and missed deadlines. Founder Xing Ming faced a 20.66 million yuan enforcement recovery in 2024.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 新浪科技
